steps.title: Test the correct point
steps.content: For choice D, $(7,0)$, the first inequality gives $0\le7+15$, or $0\le22$, which is true.

steps.title: Check the second inequality
steps.content: The second inequality gives $0\ge-4(7)-15$, or $0\ge-43$, which is also true.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Since $(7,0)$ satisfies both inequalities, choice D is correct. The other points each fail at least one of the two inequalities.
